title: QualityCraft
description: QualityCraft is a fun new way of playing minecraft vanilla but with a sweet twist. Updates to the modpack come out ever few weeks with new mods, mobs, items, and QOF stuff.
body: QualityCRAFT is a new way of seeing the world, from making it your own dream too just a never ending adventure. Embark on new quests daily making the world more fun and open, turn the world into your own little sanctuary. Play around with the newly added Chipped mod and make your home more unique to fit your style! make life fun again and try planting new crops using Farmers delight. Make this mod whatever you want with the 15 future updates too come with different versions labeled so you can select which one you would like to play and make a paradise.
